dashboard.label: User Experience Score
dashboard.description: Critical Services and Sites with Low User Experience Score

search.query: sourcetype="apex" index="*" field_name="User Experience Score" |stats latest(_time) as _time by apex_dashboard | sort 0 - _time | head 1 | table apex_dashboard | rename apex_dashboard as url_token

html.a: Click here to visit the Apex dashboard

html.div:
No Apex Dashboard Available
No events received in the last 24 hours. Check your Apex configuration and ensure events are being sent to Splunk.
Configure Add-on Settings

panel.title: EUE Score Distribution over Last 24 Hours

search.query: sourcetype="apex" index="*" field_name = "User Experience Score" | eval current_value=replace(current_value, "Score", "") | timechart span=3m avg(current_value) as avg_score | eval "User Experience Score"=round(avg_score,3) | fields _time "User Experience Score" critical_threshold | eval critical_threshold=5
sourcetype="apex" index="*" field_name = "User Experience Score" | eval current_value=replace(current_value, "Score", "") | stats avg(current_value) BY application | sort -avg(current_value)

table.title: EUE Score for critical services over the last 60 minutes

search.query: sourcetype="apex" index="*" field_name ="User Experience Score" | where isnotnull(ip_address_server) AND isnotnull(application) AND isnotnull(current_value) | eval eue_score=replace(current_value, " Score", "") | stats avg(eue_score) AS avg_eue_score BY ip_address_server, application | eval "User Experience Score"=round(avg_eue_score, 2) | rename ip_address_server as "Server IP" | table "Server IP" application "User Experience Score" | sort + "User Experience Score"

table.title: EUE Score for different sites over the last 60 minutes

search.query: sourcetype="apex" index="*" field_name="User Experience Score" | where isnotnull(site_client) AND isnotnull(current_value) | eval eue_score=replace(current_value, " Score", "") | stats avg(eue_score) AS avg_eue_score BY site_client |eval "User Experience Score"=round(avg_eue_score, 2) |rename site_client AS "Site" | table "Site" "User Experience Score" | sort + "User Experience Score"
